name: formatNumber
description: Formats large numbers with K, M, B, T suffixes for compact display while maintaining readability.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying large numbers in dashboards and charts.
Set decimals parameter to control precision.

params.name: decimals
params.description: Number of decimal places to display.

Do: Use for large numbers in UI
Dont: Don't use for precise financial data
Don't forget to handle edge cases
